mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO snail_ai_observation (id, trace_id, parent_observation_id, type, name, input, output, start_time, end_time, model, level, environment, input_tokens, output_tokens, total_cost, attributes) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.traceId}, #{item.parentObservationId}, #{item.type}, #{item.name}, #{item.input}, #{item.output}, #{item.startTime}, #{item.endTime}, #{item.model}, #{item.level}, #{item.environment}, #{item.inputTokens}, #{item.outputTokens}, #{item.totalCost}, #{item.attributes})
